channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Meta's head of AI research stepping down
item.description: The head of Meta’s artificial intelligence research division said she plans to step down, vacating a high-profile position at the parent company of Facebook and Instagram at a time of intense competition in the development of AI technology.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Trump to hold a meeting on possible investors to buy TikTok with possible ban at stake
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — President Donald Trump will hold a Wednesday meeting with aides about possible investors who could buy a stake in TikTok, a deal that could potentially stop the social media site from being banned in the United States.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and JOSH BOAK, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: SpaceX flight launches 4 space tourists into first-ever polar orbit
item.description: A bitcoin investor who bought a SpaceX flight for himself and three polar explorers blasted off Monday night on the first rocket ride to carry people over the North and South poles. Chun Wang, a Chinese-born entrepreneur, hurtled into orbit from NASA’s Kennedy Space Center.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Two Nintendo Treehouse streams will air this week and feature hands-on gameplay of Switch 2 titles
item.description: Nintendo has announced that it will be airing two Treehouse presentations later this week, offering a new look at Switch 2 gameplay.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: House of the Dragon showrunner hits back at George R.R. Martin criticism as filming begins on hit HBO TV show's third season
item.description: Filming is underway on House of the Dragon season 3, but it's been overshadowed by a spat between its showrunner and George R.R. Martin.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte” to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: Mike Silverman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Amazon, OpenAI, and China’s Zhipu unveil new AI tools amid intensifying competition
item.description: A wave of new AI products is hitting the market, signaling a shift toward more autonomous, task-completing systems that could reshape how businesses and consumers interact with digital services. Amazon has unveiled Nova Act, an AI agent designed to operate a web browser much like a human user.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: El gasto mundial en IA para 2025 rondará los 644.000 millones de dólares
item.description: La inteligencia artificial (IA) mantiene su popularidad en la lista de prioridades de inversión de las organizaciones. Así lo confirma la firma de análisis e investigación Gartner al situar el gasto mundial en IA para 2025 en, aproximadamente, 644.000 millones de dólares.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Bitcoin investor buys an entire SpaceX flight for the ultimate polar adventure
item.description: A bitcoin investor is headed to space with three polar explorers on the first flight to carry people over the North and South poles.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thousands of workers at nation's health agencies brace for mass layoffs
item.description: As they readied to leave work Monday, some workers at the Food and Drug Administration were told to pack their laptops and prepare for the possibility that they wouldn’t be back.
item.dc:creator: Amanda Seitz And Matthew Perrone, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025
item.description: The three keys to building a resilient cyber culture is demonstrating leadership commitment, continually improving and staying flexible. The post Prioritizing an enterprisewide cyber culture in 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Apple and SpaceX enter the Star Wars era
item.description: Apple and SpaceX may be on a satellite communications collision course with Elon Musk’s firm attempting to block Apple from expanding satellite messaging for iPhones unless it does so with Starlink rather than other satellite communications partners.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DNA Data Concerns: 23andMe Bankruptcy and Genetic Information Protection
item.description: Concerns about genetic information protection arise as ancestry-research company 23andMe files for bankruptcy
item.dc:creator: Michael Ramsey, NewsNation

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI startup just bought X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said on Friday that his xAI has acquired X, the social media app formerly known as Twitter, in an all-stock transaction for $45 billion, including $12 billion in debt. “xAI and X’s futures are intertwined.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Musk says xAI buys social media platform X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said Friday his artificial intelligence firm xAI has bought his social media platform X. "xAI and X’s futures are intertwined. Today, we officially take the step to combine the data, models, compute, distribution and talent," Musk wrote in a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Google’s Scott Frohman on restoring symmetry to the cyber fight
item.description: The cloud, AI and zero trust can help DoD and the services better protect their networks from cyberattacks, says Google Public Sector’s defense programs leader.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: DoD Cyber Challenges: Ensuring Security and Resiliency in a Constantly Evolving Environment
item.description: The Defense Department faces four main challenges when it comes to modernizing and securing data and systems, including ensuring mobile device security, moving to a zero-trust architecture, protecting against foreign commercial spyware, and mitigating cyberthreats to the defense industrial base.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Man accused of coercing 9-year-old into sharing explicit images after chatting on TikTok and Roblox
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A U.S. airman has been charged with coercing a 9-year-old girl to share sexually explicit images of herself after he posed as a 13-year-old and chatted with the child on TikTok and the gaming site Roblox.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: OpenAI, Google AI data centers are under stress after new genAI model launches
item.description: New generative AI (genAI) models introduced this week by Google and OpenAI have put the companies’ data centers under stress — and both companies are trying to catch up to demand.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft sets May end date for Skype after 14-year run
item.description: Microsoft is discontinuing Skype in May after 22 years of service. Kurt the CyberGuy addresses other options for internet-based phone and video service.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: ClickFix malware tricks you into infecting your own Windows PC
item.description: Hackers are tricking people into installing password-stealing malware by making them press keyboard shortcuts under the pretense of proving they're not bots.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
